Even more devastating: the entire company's insured headcount is an absolute 0! The logical deduction instantly turned into a highly satirical comedy: in the industrial concentration zone of Guli Sub-district, the boss hasn't hired a single employee, claiming to have built a large 'seismic bracing and busway' manufacturing factory requiring giant punch presses and bending machines? The boss is a veteran engineering middleman who spent millions advancing funds to pull the registered capital up to over 20 million, purely to seize the bidding threshold for large construction projects (building seismic bracing, fire protection wiring). After winning a bid, the entire set of equipment relies on outsourced OEM or buying off-the-shelf, and the construction is entirely sub-contracted.
